summary: Tested Admin Panel features - All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. 5 pre-seeded accounts display correctly, balance cards show EUR/USD/Total, account expansion shows detailed info, Add/Delete account flows work, server terminal displays color-coded logs.

issues: Chart dimension warnings in console (width/height -1) - minor, charts still render correctly
HTML hydration warning - span inside tbody element - doesn't affect functionality
Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement opportunity

critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - proper data-testid attributes on all interactive elements
API endpoints follow RESTful conventions with proper error handling
seed_data_creation: 5 accounts pre-seeded via POST /api/seed-data: NADELLA GLOBAL LLC, PLINVEST TRUST, ZHANG YINGFAN, QIRAT EP GMBH, BONA Verwaltungs GmbH
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Panel at /admin route is fully functional. All account CRUD operations work. Server terminal displays real-time logs with color coding (OK=green, ERROR=red, WARN=yellow, SYSTEM=cyan). Balance cards update dynamically when accounts are added/deleted.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/accounts-balance - Returns EUR, USD, and total balance
Backend: POST /api/accounts - Creates new account successfully
Backend: DELETE /api/accounts/{invalid_id} - Returns 404 for non-existent account
Backend: GET /api/server-terminal - Returns logs with multiple levels
Backend: Balance totals update correctly after CRUD operations
Frontend: Admin Panel page loads at /admin route
Frontend: Balance cards display EUR, USD, and Total Available Balance
Frontend: 5 pre-seeded accounts display in accounts list
Frontend: Account rows expand to show detailed info (company, representative, bank details)
Frontend: Add Account dialog opens and form fields work
Frontend: Account creation works via UI
Frontend: Account deletion works via UI with confirm dialog
Frontend: Server terminal displays logs with color coding
Frontend: Navigation sidebar includes Admin Panel link

mocked_apis.POST /api/transactions/{id}/send-notific: Email notification endpoint is mocked (returns success without actual email)
